articles.title: 'Tough summer': Extreme heat and wildfire smoke expected to arrive in Edmonton this week
articles.description: 'We're already seeing that the air quality is quite poor though most of north central and northern Alberta and we can see it starting to creep into the capital region this morning'

articles.title: Misinformation concern raised about missing Calgary boy
articles.description: As the search continues for 11-year-old Parker Wells, police are advising caution about AI generated content about the case. Calgary police say inaccurate content is spreading online, including unverified images, videos and claims about sightings of Parker and his whereabouts. “Obviously it&#8

articles.title: Trump’s forced labour tariffs set to go into effect this week. What to know
articles.description: Last month, the Trump administration proposed that tariffs of 10 per cent or more be imposed on products from dozens of major trading partners after a probe into forced labour.

articles.title: Cyclosporiasis hospitalized a bride on her honeymoon as U.S. outbreak spreads
articles.description: A Wisconsin bride blames lettuce for sending her to the ER on her honeymoon. U.S. officials aren't so sure anymore. The parasite behind a huge outbreak has no confirmed source

articles.title: Fort McMurray youth facing charges following illegal OHV use
articles.description: Despite warnings from RCMP, some residents continue to operate off-highway vehicles illegally in Fort McMurray

articles.title: Vancouver bids farewell to FIFA Fan Festival as Spain wins the World Cup
articles.description: The energy at FIFA Fan Festival in Vancouver was unmatched as Spain defeated Argentina to take home the World Cup.

articles.title: Boater jumped ship after severe rain sinks vessel on Ottawa River
articles.description: A boater made it to the shores of the Ottawa River unscathed after the vessel they were in rapidly filled with rainwater. articles.title: Court orders Edmonton prison to take steps to protect inmates from extreme heat
articles.description: As the Canadian Human Rights Tribunal prepares to hear a separate case about extreme heat in prisons, the Federal Court has directed an Alberta prison to take steps to install air conditioning to protect inmates. articles.description: The 24-year-old centre signed a two-year bridge deal back in May after playing 30 games in the National Hockey League in 2025-26.
